name: Instana APM API
what_it_does: Enterprise AI-powered Application Performance Monitoring (APM) platform (IBM) with REST API — providing automatic instrumentation, real-time topology discovery, distributed tracing, and AI-driven root cause analysis for microservices and container environments.
use_cases: Querying application performance metrics and traces via REST API for custom dashboards
Triggering alert acknowledgment and incident management via API integration
Exporting trace and span data for custom analysis pipelines
Querying service dependency topology for automated impact analysis
Integrating Instana alerts with ITSM tools via API or webhook
not_for: Small teams or startups (enterprise pricing and complexity)
Simple infrastructure monitoring without APM (use Datadog Infra or Prometheus)
best_when: A large enterprise needs automatic instrumentation of complex microservice environments with AI root cause analysis and no manual agent configuration.
avoid_when: You're a small team, need custom dashboards over enterprise APM, or want open-source observability (use Grafana + OpenTelemetry).

auth.notes: API token from Instana settings. Authorization header with apiToken prefix. Read-only and read-write tokens. Tenant unit scoping. OpenAPI spec published on GitHub. Webhook for alert notifications.

pricing.notes: IBM-acquired enterprise product. Per-host pricing for on-premise. Consumption-based for cloud. Automatic instrumentation (no code changes needed) is key differentiator. On-premise and SaaS deployment. EU and US data centers. Strong enterprise support.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with OpenAPI spec for infrastructure, services, traces, events, and alerts. API token auth with read/write distinction. Webhook for alerts. Good documentation maintained on GitHub. IBM ownership means enterprise-grade API stability. Tenant unit scoping for multi-tenant setups.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All metric and trace reads idempotent. Alert acknowledgment idempotent. Custom event creation creates new events. Configuration management idempotent by ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Tenant unit concept important for multi-tenant enterprise deployments
API token has 'apiToken' prefix in Authorization header (not 'Bearer')
IBM acquisition may slow API evolution — check changelog for updates
On-premise vs SaaS deployment has different API endpoint patterns

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP certified. GDPR compliant. IBM security standards. US, EU, AP data residency. API token with read/write scope. On-premise option for maximum data control. Enterprise security review process.
